stories.title: Harden self-hosting guardrails and story routing
acceptance_criteria: runtime repo project-state creation is refused unless --allow-runtime-state is passed
starting a discovery story preserves 1-discovery / discover-intent
unit tests cover self-hosting init and phase-preserving story start

stories.title: Make skill runtime path resolution plugin-native
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md instructs agents to prefer the current skill directory when running from a plugin checkout
installed skill and plugin checkout instructions do not require literal paths from Daniel's machine
launcher examples remain valid for local installs

stories.title: Compact agent workflow docs into strict state machines
acceptance_criteria: workflow references keep trigger, inputs, steps, outputs, done_when, blocked_when, and handoff
agent-facing docs avoid broad narrative and redundant method explanation

stories.title: Refresh public install docs and prove plugin install path
acceptance_criteria: README install flow matches Codex marketplace add plus Plugins UI enablement
fresh-user install simulation does not use literal local machine paths
plugin package includes skill, runtime, workflows, modules, templates, and examples
